scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix dashboard/backend && npm install --prefix dashboard/frontend && npm install --prefix admin/backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix dashboard/backend" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix admin/backend" "npm run dev --prefix admin/frontend"
scripts.dev:dashboard: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix dashboard/backend" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard/frontend"
scripts.dev:admin: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix admin/backend" "npm run dev --prefix admin/frontend"
